ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
ayahs.translation: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةًۭ يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌۭ مُّسْتَمِرٌّۭ
ayahs.translation: And if they see a miracle, they turn away and say, "Passing magic."

ayahs.arabic: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍۢ مُّسْتَقِرٌّۭ
ayahs.translation: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
ayahs.translation: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence -

ayahs.arabic: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَٰلِغَةٌۭ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahs.translation: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].

ayahs.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍۢ نُّكُرٍ
ayahs.translation: So leave them, [O Muhammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,

ayahs.arabic: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌۭ مُّنتَشِرٌۭ
ayahs.translation: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,

ayahs.arabic: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌۭ
ayahs.translation: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."

ayahs.arabic: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍۢ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌۭ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
ayahs.translation: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.

ayahs.arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌۭ فَٱنتَصِرْ
ayahs.translation: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."

ayahs.arabic: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍۢ مُّنْهَمِرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down

ayahs.arabic: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًۭا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍۢ قَدْ قُدِرَ
ayahs.translation: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.

ayahs.arabic: وَحَمَلْنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍۢ وَدُسُرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,

ayahs.arabic: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءًۭ لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
ayahs.translation: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَٰهَآ ءَايَةًۭ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?

ayahs.arabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.translation: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

ayahs.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌۭ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.translation: 'Aad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًۭا صَرْصَرًۭا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍۢ مُّسْتَمِرٍّۢ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,

ayahs.arabic: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍۢ مُّنقَعِرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.

ayahs.arabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.translation: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

ayahs.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahs.translation: Thamud denied the warning

ayahs.arabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًۭا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًۭا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًۭا لَّفِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ وَسُعُرٍ
ayahs.translation: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.

ayahs.arabic: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌۭ
ayahs.translation: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."

ayahs.arabic: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًۭا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
ayahs.translation: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةًۭ لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.

ayahs.arabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍۢ مُّحْتَضَرٌۭ
ayahs.translation: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].

ayahs.arabic: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
ayahs.translation: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].

ayahs.arabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.translation: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent upon them one blast from the sky, and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

ayahs.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahs.translation: The people of Lot denied the warning.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍۢ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَٰهُم بِسَحَرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn

ayahs.arabic: نِّعْمَةًۭ مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
ayahs.translation: As favor from us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahs.translation: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.translation: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌۭ مُّسْتَقِرٌّۭ
ayahs.translation: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.

ayahs.arabic: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.translation: So taste My punishment and warning.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahs.translation: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.

ayahs.arabic: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍۢ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
ayahs.translation: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.

ayahs.arabic: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌۭ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahs.translation: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scripture?

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌۭ مُّنتَصِرٌۭ
ayahs.translation: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?

ayahs.arabic: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
ayahs.translation: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].

ayahs.arabic: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
ayahs.translation: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ وَسُعُرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
ayahs.translation: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَٰهُ بِقَدَرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌۭ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
ayahs.translation: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember?

ayahs.arabic: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍۢ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahs.translation: And everything they did is in written records.

ayahs.arabic: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍۢ وَكَبِيرٍۢ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
ayahs.translation: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَنَهَرٍۢ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers,

ayahs.arabic: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍۢ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
ayahs.translation: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.
